title: How to Build an AI Agent with Claude Code (Claude AI Agent Tutorial)
summary: Tutorial on constructing AI agents using Claude that emphasizes proper agent architecture with planning modes, decision-making processes, and knowledge files. Covers workspace setup, the role of CLAUDE.md configuration files, and common implementation mistakes.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Master walks through building AI agents with Claude Code, focusing on agent architecture rather than one-off prompts. It covers workspace setup, the role of CLAUDE.md configuration files, planning modes, decision-making processes, and knowledge files that ground agent behavior. It also flags common implementation mistakes, and touches on multi-agent systems, Goal Mode, prompt engineering, and tool use.
